estimates.formula: sum(w_i * y_i) / sum(w_i) over nonmissing y_i

generated_sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND (("j1"."mortgage_count" >= 1)) THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e0_num_w", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND TRUE THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e0_den_w", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND (("j1"."mortgage_count" >= 1)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_num_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND TRUE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_den_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (TRUE) AND NOT ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_invalid_w_n", SUM(CASE WHEN FALSE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e0_missing_y_n", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (("j1"."mortgage_count" >= 1)) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND ("j1"."mortgage_total" IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST(CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DOUBLE) * CAST("j1"."mortgage_total" AS DOUBLE) AS DECIMAL(36,12)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(36,12)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(36,12))) AS "__e1_num_w", COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (("j1"."mortgage_count" >= 1)) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND ("j1"."mortgage_total" IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST("b"."WEIGHT" AS DECIMAL(18,6)) ELSE CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) END), CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS "__e1_den_w", SUM(CASE WHEN (("j1"."mortgage_count" >= 1)) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND ("j1"."mortgage_total" IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e1_num_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (("j1"."mortgage_count" >= 1)) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND ("j1"."mortgage_total" IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e1_den_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (("j1"."mortgage_count" >= 1)) AND NOT ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e1_invalid_w_n", SUM(CASE WHEN (("j1"."mortgage_count" >= 1)) AND ("b"."WEIGHT" IS NOT NULL AND "b"."WEIGHT" > 0) AND "j1"."mortgage_total" IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "__e1_missing_y_n" FROM "ahs_household" AS "b" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "CONTROL", COUNT(*) AS "mortgage_count", SUM("MORTAMT") AS "mortgage_total" FROM "ahs_mortgage" AS "c1" GROUP BY "CONTROL") AS "j1" ON "b"."CONTROL" = "j1"."CONTROL" WHERE ("b"."INTSTATUS" = 1) LIMIT 10001

formulas.missing_value_rule: Numerator is a subset of the denominator; ineligible weights are excluded.
formulas.weight_rule: Only non-null positive weights are eligible.

formulas.estimate_formula: sum(w_i * y_i) / sum(w_i) over nonmissing y_i
formulas.missing_value_rule: Rows with missing y_i or ineligible weights are excluded from both terms.
formulas.weight_rule: Only non-null positive weights are eligible.

metadata.weight_eligibility_rule: weight IS NOT NULL AND weight > 0
metadata.arithmetic_rule: DuckDB DECIMAL(18,6) component sums; final ratios rounded HALF_EVEN to 6 decimal places

variance.message: Descriptive weighted estimates only. Standard errors, confidence intervals, and significance tests are unavailable until replicate weights and an approved variance method are implemented.
